ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs (e.g., Mining, Industrial) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique stock symbol for the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* More granular sub-sector within the sector */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Current market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Market Cap, Dividend Yield) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., annual, quarterly, monthly) */,
  "metric_value_numeric" TEXT /* Numeric value of the metric for easier calculations */,
  "metric_value_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_analysis" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "average_market_cap" TEXT /* Average market capitalization of companies in this sector */,
  "average_dividend_yield" TEXT /* Average dividend yield of companies in this sector */,
  "median_market_cap" TEXT /* Median market capitalization of companies in this sector */,
  "median_dividend_yield" TEXT /* Median dividend yield of companies in this sector */,
  "sector_performance_index" TEXT /* A composite index reflecting the overall performance of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analysis_sector_name FOREIGN KEY ("sector_name") REFERENCES companies ("sector")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "number_of_listed_companies" INTEGER /* Total number of companies listed on the exchange */,
  "total_market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of all listed companies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., analyst, investor, financial advisor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" TEXT /* Predicted value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
